forbidden_claims.reason: Odin does not certify production readiness; this requires external audit.
Odin does not perform security certification; this requires external security review.
Odin does not certify releases; this requires release authority outside repo.
Odin does not claim live model inference without a host-scoped receipt.
Odin does not perform real model benchmarks; route evaluation is structural only.
Odin does not claim model superiority; no benchmark evidence.
Provider execution is disabled by default; requires explicit flag.
Odin does not apply app state; app owns all apply decisions.
Odin does not mutate app state; app owns all state.
Odin does not send external messages; app owns external send.
Odin does not use public network by default.
Odin does not grant hidden agent authority; all agent work is advisory.

policy_summary: Odin claims compiler v0 classifies release claims. Allowed claims: structural evidence, host-scoped local receipts, candidate-only outputs. Forbidden claims: production readiness, security certification, release certification, live model inference without receipt, model superiority, app apply, app state mutation, external send, public network, hidden agent authority.
